owner.name: Your Name
owner.title: Your Title (e.g. Founder, Account Manager, Director of Sales)

company.name: Your Company
company.industry: What your company does, one line. Used as context in Claude prompts.

mailbox._comment: provider must be 'gmail' or 'outlook'. Outlook uses Microsoft 365 / Graph API.

voice._comment: Set false after running the Learn-My-Voice button to use your extracted persona.

credentials._comment: Set in the installer or via the dashboard Settings tab. Stored encrypted in Apps Script Properties + Supabase secrets, never in this file.
